errors: Full email body retrieval failed for all emails due to Microsoft Graph API MailboxConcurrency rate limit (HTTP 429). To-do extraction based on email search snippets only.
Calendar content retrieval failed due to same rate limit. No calendar-sourced action items extracted this run.
Non-deal calendar scan (LP meetings, internal meetings) could not be performed due to rate limit.
